title: Everything You Need to Plan a Group Trip

cards.title: Explore and propose ideas to the group
cards.description:
Find activities, restaurants, accommodation and transport directly in the app.
Add them to the itinerary or propose them to the group to vote.

Exploration becomes collaborative.

cards.title: Decide together with polls
cards.description:
Where to stay?
What to do?
When to leave?

Create a poll, everyone votes, the decision is made.
The group moves forward. The trip too.

cards.title: A clear itinerary, day by day
cards.description:
Each day of the trip is structured:
what to do, where to eat, where to sleep, how to get there.

Everything is clear for everyone.
